DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED AND OF NONAPPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO DEEM ADMITTED THE TRUTH OF ANY MATTERS SPECIFIED IN ITS REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE, IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT R.J. BANKS FAILED TO TIMELY RESPOND TO THIS DISCOVERY AND HAS THEREBY WAIVED OBJECTIONS. (CODE CIV. PROC., SEC. 2033.280, SUBD. (A).) THE TRUTH OF ANY MATTERS SPECIFIED IN THE REQUESTS IS DEEMED ADMITTED BY DEFENDANT. (ID., SEC. 2033.280, SUBDS. (B), (C).) PLAINTIFF DOES NOT SEEK SANCTIONS, BUT THEY ARE MANDATORY IN THIS INSTANCE. (ID., SEC. 2033.280, SUBD. (C).) THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY $50 IN SANCTIONS TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN 30 DAYS. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-06-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar May-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AND OF NONAPPEARANCE

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as moot. Parties entered into a stipulation for entry of judgment on May 4, 2026. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Continued To May-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AND OF NONAPPEARANCE

Appearances:
Douglas Agne of the Reese Law Group (760.842.5850, dagne@reeselawgroup.com) appearing via Zoom for plaintiff and moving party;
R J Banks (415.786.8254) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona.

Discussed. Mr. Agne and defendant will meet and confer. The court modifies its ruling as follows: continued to May 15, 2026 for hearing. Any supplemental filing may be made no later than May 8, 2026. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in its Requests for Admission, Set One, is granted. Defendant R.J. Banks failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280, subd. (a).) The truth of any matters specified in the requests is deemed admitted by Defendant. (Id., sec. 2033.280, subds. (b), (c).) Plaintiff does not seek sanctions, but they are mandatory in this instance. (Id., sec. 2033.280, subd. (c).) The court orders Defendant to pay $50 in sanctions to Plaintiff within 30 days.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Set For Trial On Jun-01-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
